title: Court Clerk

rationales.taskAutomation: Docketing, filing, records requests, and fee processing are routine document handling that current AI and e-filing systems already do at high reliability.
rationales.toolMaturity: E-filing, document management, and OCR systems are mature and widely deployed in modern court administration.
rationales.adoption: Court systems are government bodies that adopt e-filing and automation more slowly than private legal-services firms, and many still run on legacy systems.
rationales.agenticExposure: Filing, docketing, and routine public-counter queries form an agent-traversable pipeline of digital handoffs.

tasksGrowing: Handling unusual or contested procedural questions
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 43-4031, p25-p75 rounded

defenseSkills.skill: E-filing and court case-management system fluency
Public-facing customer service and courtroom support skills

insight: A document-heavy government role where mature e-filing and OCR tools already cover much of the routine workload.
